title: Explorer's Blend
description: It integrates many mods (such as End Remastered, Mine Cells, Terralith, Twilight Forest, Marium's Soulslike Weaponry, Spelunkery, Bosses of Mass Destruction and Frostiful) to create a better exploration experience.
body:
Explorer's Blend is a datapack that integrates many mods (such as End Remastered, Mine Cells, Terralith, Twilight Forest, Marium's Soulslike Weaponry, Spelunkery, Bosses of Mass Destruction and Frostiful) to create a better exploration experience.

Features:
- Adds Mine Cells portal to volcanic Terralith biomes
- Adds Mine Cells mobs to volcanic Terralith biomes
- Adds End Remastered eyes to many bosses, as listed below.

```
Night Lich: Cold Eye
Nether Gauntlet: Nether Eye
Void Blossom: Lost Eye
The Decaying King: Corrupted Eye
The Old Champion's Remains: Undead Eye
The Frenzied Shade: Cursed Eye
The Returning Knight: Evil Eye
The Fallen Icon: Black Eye
The Monarch of Chaos: Wither Eye
The Conjunctivius: Exotic Eye
The Naga: Rogue Eye
The Twilight Lich: Old Eye
The Minoshroom: Guardian Eye
The Hydra: Magical Eye
The Knight Phantom: Cryptic Eye
The Ur-Ghast: Witch Eye
Frostologer: Cold Eye (50% chance)
```
- Changes redstone ore behavior so that it always drops redstone, and at a 50% rate, cinnabar (enabling to turn off the rough gems Spelunkery's option and still make items that depends on cinnabar)
- Multiplayer: changes the sleep game rule
```
gamerule playersSleepingPercentage 51
```

This datapack is intended to be used in a modpack.
